inline_comments.message:
It seems this method always returns 'true', but according to the comment in 'DroolsController.offer(...)', it should return 'true' if the operation is successful.

This one should probably be 'return successInject', the ones at line 519 and 533 are probably OK, but the other returns in this method should probably be 'return false'.

I imagine that no one is really looking at the return value to this method, but as long as it isn't 'void', it should probably return something consistent with the description.
